text:
On Mon, Jan 14, 2002 at 01:52:03PM +0100, Jimmy Olgeni wrote:
> Do you still have this problem with version 0.11.2?

No idea, I've only tried the ports version, sitecopy-0.10.15_1.  The
author supplied me with a patch from his cvs tree which enabled it to
work.  It worked, so I didn't pursue the matter further, although I must
say, I though I had submitted it as a PR...

-Dom
